excluded_categories.reason: No requirement or business rule mentions user roles, access levels, or permission-based restrictions.
No requirement specifies network conditions, connectivity, or offline behavior.
No requirement mentions language, locale, or regional formatting.
No requirement specifies timezone handling for verification link expiration or cooldown.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive scenarios for successful registration with valid email and password meeting all rules, successful email verification within 24 hours, and successful resend of verification link after 60-second cooldown.

Generate negative scenarios for registration with duplicate email, invalid email format (missing '@' or domain), password length less than 8 or greater than 12, missing uppercase/lowercase/digit/special character, consecutive spaces, password containing email prefix or username, and leading/trailing spaces in password (not trimmed).
Generate boundary scenarios for password length exactly 8 and exactly 12 characters, verification link expiration exactly at 24 hours, and resend cooldown exactly at 60 seconds.

Generate business rule scenarios for unique email enforcement, password composition rules, verification link expiration after 24 hours, and resend cooldown enforcement on both client and server sides.

Generate security scenarios for brute-force attempts on email uniqueness, injection attacks in email or password fields, bypassing resend cooldown via API manipulation, and expired verification link reuse.
Generate UX/UI scenarios for inline error messages displayed for duplicate email, invalid email format, and invalid password length; also for loading states during registration and resend actions.
Generate integration scenarios for email sending service reliability (e.g., service down, slow response) and server-side enforcement of cooldown and link expiration.
